Motion For Entry Of Judgmnt Pursuant To Stip
Off Calendar Jul-15-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC , AS SERVICER FOR ('ASF') WILMINGTON TRUST, N.A., AS ISSUER LOAN TRUSTEE FOR ONEMAIN FINANCIAL ISSUANCE TRUST 2020-2's Motion For Entry Of Judgmnt Pursuant To Stipulation.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for entry of judgment pursuant to stipulation of the parties" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
